description_long: This is a suburban residential bungalow complex featuring multiple single-story structures with pitched, gray gable roofs and white exterior walls. The main building is larger and more elongated, with several smaller outbuildings and garages arranged on green lawns, connected by paved driveways and walkways. Vehicles, outdoor furniture, and various household items are visible around the property, suggesting active use and family occupancy. The roofs are consistent in style, and the windows are rectangular, distributed asymmetrically across the facades. The property is divided into distinct sections, with garages and sheds separated from the main living area. The overall layout is open, with ample yard space and clear separation between buildings.
description: A suburban bungalow complex with multiple white, single-story buildings, gray gable roofs, and green lawns, featuring garages, sheds, and outdoor items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow, garages, driveways, and visible vehicles and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the main building, a swimming pool, and the arrangement of outbuildings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated main structure, garages, and the separation between different building sections.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the garages, sheds, and the open yard space.
